summary: Added caller_balances (phone_number PK, total_minutes_purchased, minutes_used, free_tier_used, free_tier_limit=15) and purchases (id PK, stripe_session_id, stripe_payment_intent, product_name, minutes_purchased, amount_cents) tables to DuckDB. Also added CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS to initDb() in hotline-webhook.ts. All 5 existing tables verified unchanged.
broadcast: DuckDB schema ready. caller_balances has free_tier_limit=15 default. purchases table logs Stripe transactions. initDb() auto-creates on startup.
